ground_truth.title: Dental Care Information for Professionals | Dentalcare.com
ground_truth.main_content: Dentalcare.com provides free continuing education, patient education and practice management resources to help dental professionals succeed with their patients. Together we can build healthier & brighter smiles with 150+ FREE Continuing Education Courses. Featured courses include Evidence-Based Guidelines for the Use of Over-the-Counter Oral Care Prophylactic Medicine (1.5 hours), Practical Panoramic Imaging (3 hours), and Intraoral Imaging Techniques: Beyond the Textbook (2 hours). The site offers professional resources including Crest and Oral-B products for dental professionals through the ProShop. Continuing education courses are available covering various topics including radiographic imaging, oral care medicine, and dental techniques.
with: Dentalcare.com provides free continuing education, patient education and practice management resources to help dental professionals succeed with their patients.
Together we can build healthier & brighter smiles with 150+ FREE Continuing Education Courses.
Evidence-Based Guidelines for the Use of Over-the-Counter Oral Care Prophylactic Medicine
Panoramic radiographic imaging technique, error recognition and error correction are the primary areas of emphasis in this course.
This course will briefly review the basics of intraoral imaging, but most importantly will go beyond those basics by highlighting common difficulties with sensors.
